diff: The Launch Agent 7 Artifact cannot be edited in any way that violates the Sky Core Atlas or its specifications of the Sky Primitives, or in any way that is otherwise misaligned. The Operational Facilitator must enforce this rule through their review of Artifact Edit Proposals.
